element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary mechanic; first sword attack after game start is always ineffective (intentional design quirk)
Core movement; sticky floors mechanic, speed preservation through momentum
Vertical navigation skill; enables access to upper areas and recovery from falls
Ranged attacks; limited supply, consumed per use

element_introduction_order.element: Ninpo special attacks (Fire Wheel, Windmill Star, Invincible Fire Wheel, Jump and Slash)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Resource-based (Ninpo meter); powerful but requires meter accumulation
Adaptive tracking AI; player must predict trajectories
High damage output; require timing to avoid
Culminating challenges; unique attack patterns per boss
60-frame invulnerability after taking damage; enables risk assessment
Time pressure mechanic; life lost if timer expires
Temporary time extension; spawned during gameplay

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platform areas between enemy spawns
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy spawn (especially projectile-based: knife tossers, birds)
Multiple enemy types on screen simultaneously
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty curve with cinematic story breaks providing narrative relief between combat-intense acts; tension builds through enemy variety introduction and act progression; bosses serve as climactic tension release points

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Upper platforms and wall-climbing passages often contain optional power-ups; vertical exploration rewarded
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Wall-climbing allows access to hidden upper areas; Japanese version places some power-ups higher than international versions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Acts 1-2 introduce core mechanics (katana, jumping, wall-climbing, basic enemies) with moderate pacing; establishes story foundation; enemies are relatively predictable
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Acts 3-4 introduce advanced enemy types (Tyson enemies, cheetahs, coordinated attacks) and Ninpo resource management becomes critical; platforming challenges increase
difficulty_curve.late_game: Acts 5-6 combine all mechanics; multiple enemy types per level; tight timing required; Masked Devil and Jaquio boss fights demand mastery of all learned skills; lunar eclipse sequence escalates tension maximally
notable_spikes: Act 3 transition: introduction of Tyson-type heavy enemies and cheetahs
Act 5: life-or-death struggle (Shitou) narrative framing; density of enemies increases
Masked Devil boss fight: emotional stakes combined with combat difficulty
Jashin demon final boss: pattern complexity and damage output significantly elevated

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontal progression through Amazon temple grounds; introduces wall-climbing as vertical escape mechanic; establishes enemy encounter frequency baseline
Narrative-driven pacing; player chasing Basaquer; enemy combinations become more complex; aerial and ground threats coexist
Confined spaces increase enemy density perception; platforming + combat timing crucial; boss precedes final ascent
Vertical emphasis; continuous escalation; multiple mini-bosses before main boss; visual and audio intensity maximized; cinematic story payoff integrated
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Act 5: Life-or-death Struggle (Shitou); Act 6: Conquering the Devil (Gouma)
